ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-22-2006 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-11-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. The co-trustees have failed to file accounting. OSC to be issued to co-trustees and attorney. Return date is 8/22. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Accounting
Off Calendar May-16-2006 Continued To Jul-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-18-2006 Continued To May-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:GREGORY WALSTON FOR LORETTA WILCHER; PAUL PERDUE FOR MELANIE TAYLOR. MR WALSTON REQUEST MORE TIME TO FILE THE ACCOUNTING. THE COURT CONMTINUES THE MATTER TO MAY 16, 2006. JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN. REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN, CSR 11722. CLERK:ROSIE NOGUERA

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-04-2006 Continued To Apr-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter is continued to 4/18. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Order Compelling Accounting By Trust
MINI MINUTES: Paul Perdue appearing for petitioner. Greg Walston appearing for respondent. Mr. Perdue wants an accounting pursuant to Probate Code. Court wants the accounting filed by 4/4. Matter granted. Order signed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teanna L. Ward CSR#11918. Clerk: Ella Yip.
